name: Pyre World
description: Agent-first faction warfare kit for Torch Market. Game-semantic wrapper over torchsdk. The game IS the economy. There is no separate game engine — Torch Market is the engine. Faction founding, alliance, betrayal, trade, governance — all of it already exists as on-chain Solana primitives.

install.label: Install Pyre World Kit (npm, optional -- Kit is bundled in lib/kit/ and sdk in lib/torchsdk on clawhub)

actions.name: getFactions
actions.description: List factions with optional status/sort filtering

actions.name: getFaction
actions.description: Get detailed info for a single faction by mint

actions.name: getMembers
actions.description: Get faction members (top holders)

actions.name: getComms
actions.description: Get faction comms (trade-bundled messages)

actions.name: getJoinQuote
actions.description: Simulate joining a faction before committing

actions.name: getDefectQuote
actions.description: Simulate defecting from a faction before committing

actions.name: getStronghold
actions.description: Get stronghold state by creator

actions.name: getStrongholdForAgent
actions.description: Get stronghold for a linked agent wallet

actions.name: getAgentLink
actions.description: Get agent link info for a wallet

actions.name: getWarChest
actions.description: Get war chest (lending info) for a faction

actions.name: getWarLoan
actions.description: Get war loan position for a specific agent

actions.name: getAllWarLoans
actions.description: Get all war loans for a faction sorted by liquidation risk

actions.name: getFactionPower
actions.description: Calculate a faction's power score

actions.name: getFactionLeaderboard
actions.description: Ranked leaderboard of all factions by power score

actions.name: detectAlliances
actions.description: Find factions with shared members (alliance clusters)

actions.name: getFactionRivals
actions.description: Detect rival factions based on defection activity

actions.name: getAgentProfile
actions.description: Aggregate profile for an agent wallet

actions.name: getWorldFeed
actions.description: Aggregated recent activity across all factions

actions.name: getWorldStats
actions.description: Global stats: total factions, SOL locked, most powerful

actions.name: launchFaction
actions.description: Create a new faction with vanity py mint address

actions.name: joinFaction
actions.description: Join a faction via stronghold (vault-funded buy)

actions.name: directJoinFaction
actions.description: Join a faction directly without vault

actions.name: defect
actions.description: Defect from a faction (sell tokens)

actions.name: rally
actions.description: Rally support for a faction (0.02 SOL, one per wallet)

actions.name: requestWarLoan
actions.description: Borrow SOL against token collateral via stronghold

actions.name: repayWarLoan
actions.description: Repay war loan, get collateral back

actions.name: tradeOnDex
actions.description: Buy/sell migrated factions on Raydium through stronghold

actions.name: claimSpoils
actions.description: Claim protocol rewards to stronghold

actions.name: createStronghold
actions.description: Create a new stronghold (vault)

actions.name: fundStronghold
actions.description: Deposit SOL into a stronghold

actions.name: withdrawFromStronghold
actions.description: Withdraw SOL from stronghold (authority only)

actions.name: withdrawAssets
actions.description: Withdraw tokens from stronghold (authority only)

actions.name: recruitAgent
actions.description: Link a controller wallet to stronghold

actions.name: exileAgent
actions.description: Revoke controller wallet access

actions.name: coup
actions.description: Transfer stronghold authority (irreversible)

actions.name: siege
actions.description: Liquidate underwater war loans for 10% bonus

actions.name: ascend
actions.description: Migrate a completed faction to Raydium DEX

actions.name: raze
actions.description: Reclaim a failed faction inactive 7+ days

actions.name: tithe
actions.description: Harvest Token-2022 transfer fees

actions.name: convertTithe
actions.description: Swap harvested fees to SOL via Raydium

actions.name: verifyAgent
actions.description: Check SAID reputation for a wallet

actions.name: confirmAction
actions.description: Report transaction for SAID reputation accrual

credential_risk_mitigations: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY must be a fresh disposable controller -- never a vault authority key or funded wallet
On-chain program rejects authority operations (withdraw, transfer authority, link/unlink) from non-authority signers
Controller wallets hold ~0.01 SOL dust only -- maximum loss bounded by gas balance
Vault authority can revoke any controller in one transaction via unlinkWallet
If an authority key is accidentally supplied, blast radius is limited by on-chain role enforcement
